title: Mason Cash in The Forest Hedgehog Mixing Bowl 1.1 Litre | 21cm Red S30 Stoneware Bowl for Baking, Pudding & Cookie Dough, Embossed Woodland Design
features: MIXING BOWL | The Mason Cash 21cm Hedgehog Red Mixing Bowl is perfect for pudding and cookie dough mixes.
DETAIL | Part of the Mason Cash In the Forest range this bowl is embossed with hedgehog forest scenes inspired by folk tales of the mid-19th Century.
CARE & USE | This mixing bowl is dishwasher and freezer safe.

IN THE FOREST | The In The Forest range features detailed woodland embossments originally carved by skilled craftsmen. The mixing bowls and pudding basins are our most popular sizes and are designed to stack together to save on space.

MASON CASH | First designed in 1901, the original Mason Cash mixing bowl has endured the test of time and become something of a design classic. Alongside the much-loved mixing bowl, Mason Cash is also well known for our classic pudding basins, cane pet bowls and bakeware.
